prInfo.title: [NO-JIRA] - chore: Labeler 설정
prInfo.body:
### 개요
 - [NO-JIRA] - Labeler 설정



### 작업 내용
 - Labeler 설정
 - 이건 Pair 구조가 잘 안나오는거 같아서 일단 부분적으로 적용, 이후에 Label 안달리는것들 계속 확인하면서 추가



### 체크리스트
- [x] 빌드 확인
- [x] 테스트 통과
prInfo.author: dongseop-lee-doodlin

changedFiles.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,92 @@
+# PR 변경 파일 경로 기반 자동 라벨링 설정
+# ── 도메인 (adaptor + business 그룹핑) ──
+ats:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "adaptor/ats/**"
+
+candidate:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "adaptor/candidate/**"
+          - "business/application/greeting/**/candidate/**"
+          - "business/application/greeting/**/applicant_account/**"
+
+communication:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "adaptor/communication/**"
+          - "business/application/greeting/**/communication/**"
+
+evaluation:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "adaptor/evaluation/**"
+          - "adaptor/meeting/**"
+          - "adaptor/ai/**"
+          - "business/application/greeting/**/evaluation/**"
+          - "business/application/greeting/**/meeting/**"
+          - "business/application/greeting/**/ai/**"
+
+opening:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "adaptor/opening/**"
+          - "business/application/greeting/**/opening/**"
+          - "business/application/greeting/**/translation/**"
+
+platform:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "adaptor/platform/**"
+
+trm:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "adaptor/trm/**"
+          - "business/application/greeting/**/trm/**"
+
+authorization:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "business/application/authorization/**"
+
+search:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "business/application/greeting/**/search/**"
+
+user:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "business/application/greeting/**/user/**"
+
+# ── 횡단 관심사 ──
+auth:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "adaptor/platform/**/authentification/**"
+          - "business/application/authorization/**"
+          - "presentation/**/aspect/Authorization*"
+          - "presentation/**/filter/AuthorizationRoute*"

+
+openapi:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "presentation/api/open/**"
+          - "presentation/**/controller/OpenApi*"
+          - "business/application/greeting/**/OpenApi*"
+          - "business/application/authorization/**/OpenApi*"
+
+# ── 컨트롤러 (presentation 통합) ──
+controller:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "presentation/**"
+
+# ── 인프라 의존성 (dependency 통합) ──
+dependency:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - "dependency/**"
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+name: "PR Labeler"
+
+on:
+  pull_request_target:
+    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  pull-requests: write
+
+jobs:
+  label:
+    runs-on: blacksmith-2vcpu-ubuntu-2404
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/labeler@v5
+        with:
+          configuration-path: ".github/labeler.yml"
+          sync-labels: true
